name: Kona Coffee Torte
recipeInstructions:
-------------
1. Dissolve instant coffee powder in 1 cup cold water.
2. Beat egg yolks until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add granulated sugar to the yolks, beating until thick.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together; add alternately with dissolved coffee to the yolks, beating well after each addition.
5. Add vanilla and nuts.
6. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites.
7. Bake in 3 paper-lined, 9 x 1 1/2-inch round cake pans at 325°F for 30 minutes.
8. Cool cakes for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and cool completely.
9. Fill the cooled cakes with orange filling.
